title: centaurium pulchellum subsp. tenuiflorum
intro: Centaurium pulchellum subsp. tenuiflorum, also known as the mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The mountain centaury is known to offer several health benefits, including the relief of symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Centaurium pulchellum subsp. tenuiflorum typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal medicine.
